post-install-cmd: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "robocopy 'vendor\suraj\wp-5etup' '.' /E /XD vendor .git uploads /XF composer.json composer.lock wp-config.php .env /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NC /NS; if ($LASTEXITCODE -le 7) { exit 0 } else { exit $LASTEXITCODE }"
post-update-cmd: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "robocopy 'vendor\suraj\wp-5etup' '.' /E /XD vendor .git uploads /XF composer.json composer.lock wp-config.php .env /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NC /NS; if ($LASTEXITCODE -le 7) { exit 0 } else { exit $LASTEXITCODE }"
